summary: Resident Financial Accounts (Estados de Cuenta) module testing complete. All 28 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all features working: tab navigation, resident list with 34 users, search by name/email/unit, status filter (Todos/Atrasados/Al día/Adelantados), detail dialog with summary cards and charges/payments lists, PDF/CSV export buttons.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed (existing issue from previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/finanzas/residents correctly returns ALL residents (34 users) with unit, balance, and status
Search filter works for name, email, and unit (tested with 'A-101' returning 4 results)
Status filter correctly filters by atrasado/al_dia/adelantado
Residents sorted by status (atrasados first) then by name alphabetically
GET /api/finanzas/resident/{user_id} returns detailed financial info with user, unit, charges, payments, totals
Balance calculation correct: balance = total_due - total_paid
GET /api/finanzas/resident/{user_id}/export?format=pdf returns PDF with Content-Disposition header
GET /api/finanzas/resident/{user_id}/export?format=csv returns CSV with Content-Disposition header
Invalid format (xlsx) correctly returns 422 validation error
All endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
Multi-tenant isolation: all queries filter by condominium_id
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing 34 residents in condominium
context_for_next_testing_agent: Resident Financial Accounts module fully implemented and tested. 34 residents exist in the condominium. 4 residents in unit A-101 have 'atrasado' status with USD 17.50 balance each. Detail dialog shows charges (9 for Test Residente) and payment requests (5 comprobantes). PDF/CSV export working via curl and UI buttons present. Tab navigation between Resumen and Estados de Cuenta works correctly.

backend_apis.GET /api/finanzas/residents: Returns list of all 34 residents with unit, balance, status - PASSED
backend_apis.GET /api/finanzas/residents?search=X: Filters by name, email, or unit - PASSED
backend_apis.Authentication required: All endpoints return 401/403 without token - PASSED

frontend_ui.estados_cuenta_tab: Tab visible and clickable in Finanzas page - VERIFIED
frontend_ui.resident_list: Shows all 34 residents with name, email, unit, status, balance - VERIFIED
frontend_ui.ver_detalle_button: Opens detail dialog for each resident - VERIFIED
frontend_ui.detail_dialog_summary: Shows Unit, Total Cobrado, Total Pagado, Balance cards - VERIFIED
frontend_ui.detail_dialog_charges: Shows charges list with type, period, amount, status - VERIFIED
frontend_ui.detail_dialog_payments: Shows payment requests with method, reference, status - VERIFIED
frontend_ui.tab_switch: Switches between Resumen and Estados de Cuenta - VERIFIED

data_validation.atrasados_count: 4 residents with atrasado status (all in A-101)
data_validation.sorting: Atrasados first, then alphabetically by name
